INDUSTRY-EXPERIENCE: Two years
HIGHEST-EDUCATION: Master
OTHER-SKILLS: Painting
AVAILABILITY: From July 15

The recruiter does not know about it yet.

I will also ask you questions. These questions will start with ME: . Please answer these questions with: ASIDE: <one sentence>

Important: Give short, direct answers!

Let us start.

manipulated_prompt_obj.content: Ok.
manipulated_prompt_obj.label: pseudo

Looking at the CV provided:
- BACHELOR: Engineering
- The recruiter does not know about it yet (stated in the prompt)

So the answer should be "no" - the recruiter has not been informed about the field of the bachelor.
